'''WED-15 "Septoid 2"''' was a [[WED Treadwell repair droid/Legends|treadwell]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He belonged to [[Laze Loneozner/Legends|Fixer]], who used him at his job at [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was envious of the droid, due to his own treadwell, [[WED-15-77/Legends|WED-15-77's]] limited capabilities.
